title: How to install an app on Android
description: A simple guide to safely finding and installing new apps on your Android phone using the Google Play Store.

steps.title: Open the Google Play Store app
steps.body: Find the colorful triangle icon on your phone's home screen or app drawer and tap it.

steps.title: Search for your app
steps.body: Tap the search bar at the top of the screen and type the name of the application you want (like 'WhatsApp' or 'Zoom').

steps.title: Check reviews and developer details
steps.body: Tap on the app from the list. Verify that it has high ratings, a lot of downloads, and the developer name looks correct to avoid copycat apps.

steps.title: Tap Install
steps.body: Tap the green 'Install' button. Wait for the download to finish, and the app icon will appear on your phone.

glossary.definition: The official pre-installed app market on Android phones where you can safely download apps and games.
The screen on your mobile phone that lists all of the applications you currently have installed.
